details.summary: From the twin barrels of her Relic Cannon, Senna fires a unified beam of light and shadow through a target, healing allies and damaging enemies.
details.tooltip: Senna shoots a bolt of piercing shadow through an ally or enemy, dealing physical damage to enemies and Slowing them by for second(s). Restores Health to allied champions. Attacks reduce this Ability's Cooldown by second.

details.summary: Senna sends forth a wave of Black Mist. If it hits an enemy it latches onto them hungrily, rooting them and everything nearby after a brief delay.
details.tooltip: Senna sends forth the Black Mist, dealing physical damage to the first enemy hit. After a second delay the target and other nearby enemies are Rooted for second(s).

details.summary: Senna draws the Mist she has stored in her weapon into a storm around her, embracing darkness and becoming a wraith within. Allies who enter the area are camouflaged and also appear as wraiths as the Mist shrouds them. Wraiths gain increased Move Speed, are unselectable, and hide their identities.
details.tooltip: Senna dissolves into a cloud of Black Mist for seconds, becoming a Wraith. Allied champions who enter the Mist are Camouflaged and become Wraiths when they leave. Wraiths gain Move Speed, are Unselectable, and hide their identities as long as no enemy champions are nearby.

details.summary: Senna calls upon the relic stones of fallen Sentinels, splitting her relic cannon into a holy array of shadow and light. She then fires a global beam that shields allies from harm, while damaging enemies caught in the center.
details.tooltip: Senna fires a beam of light that deals physical damage to all enemy champions hit. Allied champions hit in a wider area receive Shield for seconds.

details.summary: Every third basic spell will cast twice from Seraphine. Additionally, casting spells near allies grants her bonus magic damage and range on her next basic attack.
details.tooltip: Every third basic spell will cast twice from Seraphine. Additionally, casting spells near allies grants her bonus magic damage and range on her next basic attack.

details.summary: Seraphine deals damage in an area.
details.tooltip: Seraphine projects a pure note, dealing magic damage, increased against champions and monsters by the target's missing Health percentage up to damage below % Health.

details.summary: Seraphine Shields and Hastes nearby allies. If she is already Shielded she will Heal nearby allies as well.
details.tooltip: Seraphine spurs her nearby allied champions in song, granting them Move Speed, herself decaying Move Speed and both Shield for seconds. If Seraphine is already Shielded, she calls out to her allies to join her, restoring % missing Health to them after a second delay.

details.summary: Seraphine deals damage and impairs the movement of enemies in a line.
details.tooltip: Seraphine unleashes a heavy soundwave, dealing magic damage to enemies in a line and Slowing them by % for seconds. Enemies that are already Slowed are Rooted instead, and Immobilized enemies are Stunned.

details.summary: Seraphine deals damage and charms enemies hit, refreshing the range with every allied or enemy champion hit.
details.tooltip: Seraphine takes the stage, projecting a captivating force that Charms for seconds and deals magic damage. Any champions struck (including allies) become part of the performance, extending the range of this Ability. Allied champions gain maximum Notes.

details.summary: Sett's basic attacks alternate between left and right punch. Right punch is slightly stronger and faster. Sett also hates losing, gaining additional health regeneration based off of his missing health.
details.tooltip: Sett's basic attacks alternate between left and right punch. Right punch is slightly stronger and faster. Sett also hates losing, gaining additional health regeneration based off of his missing health.

details.summary: Sett's next two attacks deal additional damage based off of the target's max health. Sett also gains Move Speed while moving towards enemy champions.
details.tooltip: Sett itches for a fight, gaining % Move Speed towards enemy champions for seconds. Additionally Sett's next two Attacks deal an additional plus max Health physical damage.

details.summary: Sett passively stores damage he takes as Grit. On cast, Sett expends all stored Grit to gain a shield and punch an area, dealing true damage in the center and physical damage on the sides.
details.tooltip: Passive: Sett stores % of damage taken as Grit, up to . Grit decays quickly seconds after the damage was taken. Active: Sett consumes all Grit, gaining a % Grit consumed Shield decaying over seconds. Sett then delivers a massive punch, dealing plus Grit consumed true damage to enemies in the center (max damage). Enemies not in the center instead take physical damage.

details.summary: Sett pulls in all enemies on opposite sides of him, dealing damage and stunning them. If enemies were only on one side, they are slowed instead of stunned.
details.tooltip: Sett smashes enemies on either side of him into each other, dealing physical damage and Slowing them by % for seconds. If Sett grabbed at least one enemy on each side, all enemies are Stunned for second.

details.summary: Sett carries an enemy champion through the air and slams them into the ground, dealing damage and slowing all enemies near where they land.
details.tooltip: Sett grabs an enemy champion and Suppresses them as he carries them forward, then slams them into the ground, dealing plus % of the grabbed enemy's bonus Health physical damage to surrounding enemies and Slowing them by % for second. Enemies take less damage the further they are from where Sett lands.

details.summary: Shaco's basic attacks and Two-Shiv Poison deal additional damage when striking from behind.
details.tooltip: Shaco's basic attacks and Two-Shiv Poison deal additional damage when striking from behind.

details.summary: Shaco becomes Invisible and teleports to target location. His first attack while Invisible is empowered, dealing bonus damage and critically striking if he attacks from behind.
details.tooltip: Shaco teleports and becomes Invisible for seconds. Using Jack In The Box or Hallucinate does not break Invisibility. Shaco's next Attack while Invisible deals an additional physical damage. If striking from behind, this Attack critically strikes for damage.

details.summary: Shaco creates a hidden animated Jack-in-the-Box. When triggered, it will fear and attack nearby enemies.
details.tooltip: Shaco creates a trap that stealths itself after seconds and lasts for seconds. It activates when an enemy comes near or when revealed, Fearing nearby enemy Champions for seconds, or seconds for minions and jungle monsters. Once activated, the trap fires at all nearby enemies for 5 seconds, dealing magic damage, or damage if focused on a single target. Jack in the Box's attacks deal an additional damage to monsters.

details.summary: Shaco's Shivs passively poison targets on hit, slowing their Move Speed. He can throw his Shivs to deal damage and poison the target. The thrown Shiv deals bonus damage if the target is below 30% health.
details.tooltip: Passive: While this Ability is off Cooldown, Shaco's Attacks Slow the target by % for seconds. Active: Shaco throws a shiv, dealing magic damage and Slowing by % for seconds. If the target has less than % Health, the shiv deals damage instead.

details.summary: Shaco creates an illusion of himself near him, which can attack nearby enemies (Deals reduced damage to turrets). Upon death, it explodes, spawning three mini Jack in the Boxes and dealing damage to nearby enemies.
details.tooltip: Shaco briefly disappears, then reappears with a clone that lasts seconds and detonates when it dies, dealing magic damage and spawning three mini Jack in the Boxes that trigger immediately. The clone deals % of Shaco's damage and receives % increased damage. Mini Jack in the Boxes deal magic damage, or magic damage if firing at only one enemy, and Fear for second.

details.summary: After casting a spell, Shen gets a shield. Affecting other champions reduces the cooldown of this effect.
details.tooltip: After casting a spell, Shen gets a shield. Affecting other champions reduces the cooldown of this effect.

details.summary: Shen recalls his spirit blade to attack with it, dealing damage based on the target's max health. The attacks are greatly empowered if it collides with an enemy champion, and all collided enemies are slowed while running away from Shen.
details.tooltip: Shen recalls his Spirit Blade. Enemies hit by the pull are Slowed by % while moving away from Shen for the next seconds. Additionally, Shen's next Attacks deal an additional plus max Health magic damage. If Shen hit an enemy champion with the Spirit Blade, the damage is increased to plus max Health magic damage and he gains % Attack Speed for those Attacks.

details.summary: Attacks that would hit Shen or his allies near his spirit blade are blocked.
details.tooltip: Shen creates a defensive zone at his Spirit Blade for seconds. Attacks against allied champions in the zone are blocked. If there are no champions to protect in the zone when it starts, it will wait for up to seconds.

details.summary: Shen dashes in a direction, taunting enemies in his path.
details.tooltip: Passive: Dealing damage with Twilight Assault or this Ability recovers Energy. Active: Shen dashes, Taunting champions and jungle monsters for seconds and dealing physical damage.

details.summary: Shen shields target allied champion from incoming damage, and soon after teleports to their location.
details.tooltip: Shen grants an allied champion anywhere on the map between and Shield based on their missing Health for seconds (max Shield at 60% missing Health). After channeling for seconds, Shen teleports to his ally's location with his Spirit Blade.

details.summary: Takedowns on enemy champions, large minions, and large monsters grant Shyvana Scalemail stacks, improving her defenses.
details.tooltip: Takedowns on enemy champions, large minions, and large monsters grant Shyvana Scalemail stacks, improving her defenses.

details.summary: Shyvana's next attack strikes both the target and the surrounding area. This Ability can be recast. While in Dragon Form, it gains an additional recast, dealing massive damage to a single target.
details.tooltip: Passive: Shyvana's Attacks deal max Health magic damage %i:OnHit% On-Hit and reduce this Ability's Cooldown by seconds. Active: Shyvana's next Attack strikes the target and the surrounding area dealing physical damage. This Ability may be Recast after an Attack or short delay within the next seconds. Dragon Form: Shyvana gains an additional Recast, causing her to bite the target of her next Attack dealing true damage.

details.summary: Shyvana gains a shield, movement speed, and after a short delay, the area around her detonates. While in Dragon Form, the explosion will heal her if it strikes an enemy champion.
details.tooltip: Shyvana wraps herself in flames for seconds, gaining Shield, increased by per nearby enemy champion and Move Speed, increased to when moving towards enemy champions. When the effect ends, the Shield is broken, or upon Recast the area around her detonates, dealing magic damage. Dragon Form: If the detonation hits an enemy champion Shyvana heals for + Missing Health.

details.summary: Shyvana launches a fireball that explodes upon striking a large target and slows them. In Dragon Form, it passes through and explodes upon striking large enemies, leaving behind a trail of fire.
details.tooltip: Shyvana launches a fireball at the target location dealing + Max health magic damage and Slowing by for seconds. It explodes upon striking an enemy or reaching its terminus. Dragon Form: Shyvana's fireball is larger and pierces through enemies. Upon striking a champion, large monster, or reaching its terminus it triggers a pulse of fire that deals + Max Health magic damage and Slows by for seconds. The fireball leaves behind a trail for seconds that deals magic damage per second.

details.summary: Shyvana transforms into a Dragon and leaps forward causing enemies along her path to flee. While in Dragon form she becomes larger and her basic abilities are empowered.
details.tooltip: Passive: Shyvana generates Dragon Fury by striking enemies with Attacks and Abilities, increased by while in Dragon Form, and reduced by when striking in an area against non-champions. Active: Shyvana transforms into her Dragon Form, becoming Unstoppable, and flying to the target location breathing fire on enemies below dealing magic damage and causing them Flee for seconds. While transformed, Shyvana's basic Abilities are upgraded, she gains bonus Health, size, and Attack Range. Shyvana loses Dragon Fury over time and her transformation ends when she has no Dragon Fury remaining.

details.summary: Singed drafts off nearby champions, gaining a burst of Move Speed when passing them.
details.tooltip: Singed drafts off nearby champions, gaining a burst of Move Speed when passing them.

details.summary: Leaves a trail of poison behind Singed, dealing damage to enemies caught in the path.
details.tooltip: Toggle: Singed lays a poisonous trail that deals magic damage per second.

details.summary: Throws a vial of mega adhesive on the ground, slowing and grounding enemies who walk on it.
details.tooltip: Singed hurls a cask of sticky liquid, Grounding and Slowing enemies in the area by % for seconds.

details.summary: Damages target enemy unit and flings them into the air behind Singed. If the target Singed flings lands in his Mega Adhesive, they are also rooted.
details.tooltip: Singed flings an enemy over his shoulder, dealing plus % max Health magic damage. If Singed flings a target into his Mega Adhesive, they are Rooted for seconds.

details.summary: Singed drinks a potent brew of chemicals, granting him increased combat stats, and making his Poison Trail apply Grievous Wounds.
details.tooltip: Singed drinks a potent brew of chemicals, granting him Ability Power, Armor, Magic Resist, Move Speed, Health Regen, and Mana Regen for seconds. During this effect, Singed's Poison Trail also applies % Grievous Wounds for second.

details.summary: After being killed, Sion will temporarily reanimate with rapidly decaying Health. His attacks become very rapid, heal him, and deal bonus damage based on his target's maximum Health.
details.tooltip: After being killed, Sion will temporarily reanimate with rapidly decaying Health. His attacks become very rapid, heal him, and deal bonus damage based on his target's maximum Health.

details.summary: Sion charges a powerful swing in an area in front of himself that will deal damage to enemies when released. If he charges for enough time, enemies hit by the swing will also be knocked up and stunned.
details.tooltip: Begin Charging: Sion charges a heavy blow for up to 2 seconds. Release: Sion slams his axe down, briefly Slowing and dealing between and physical damage based on charge time. If Sion charged for at least 1 second, enemies are Knocked Up and Stunned for between and 2.25 seconds based on charge time.

details.summary: Sion shields himself and can reactivate after 3 seconds to deal Magic Damage to enemies nearby. When Sion kills enemies, he passively gains maximum Health.
details.tooltip: Passive: Sion gains max Health when he kills a unit, or for champion takedowns, large minions and large monsters. Active: Sion gains Shield for 6 seconds. After seconds if the shield still holds, Sion can Recast to detonate the shield to deal plus % max Health magic damage.

details.summary: Sion fires a short range shockwave that damages and slows and reduces the Armor of the first enemy hit. If the shockwave hits a minion or monster, it will be knocked back, damaging, slowing, and reducing the Armor of all enemies that it passes through.
details.tooltip: Sion fires a shockwave, dealing magic damage, Slowing them by % for seconds and removing % Armor for seconds. Non-champions hit are Knocked Back. Enemies hit by a Knocked Back unit take the same damage and effects.

details.summary: Sion charges in a direction, ramping up speed over time. He can steer his charge slightly with the mouse cursor location. When he collides with an enemy he deals damage and knocks them up based on the distance he has charged.
details.tooltip: Sion charges Unstoppably in a direction for 8 seconds, turning towards the mouse cursor. Sion stops on colliding with an enemy champion or wall or on Recasting this Ability. At the end of the charge, Sion deals between and physical damage based on distance travelled. Enemies close to Sion are Stunned for between and seconds based on distance travelled. Enemies in a larger area are Slowed by % for 3 seconds.

details.summary: Sivir gains a short burst of Move Speed when she attacks an enemy champion.
details.tooltip: Sivir gains a short burst of Move Speed when she attacks an enemy champion.

details.summary: Sivir hurls her crossblade like a boomerang, dealing damage each way.
details.tooltip: Sivir hurls her crossblade like a boomerang, dealing to all enemies it cuts through. Hitting non-champions reduces the damage to subsequent targets, down to a minimum of %.

details.summary: Sivir's next few basic attacks gain additional attack speed and bounce to nearby targets, dealing reduced damage while bouncing.
details.tooltip: For the next seconds, Sivir gains % Attack Speed and her auto attacks are empowered to bounce to additional surrounding enemies dealing physical damage each bounce for up to bounces. These bounces critically strike if the attack generating them does.

details.summary: Creates a magical barrier that blocks a single enemy ability cast on Sivir. She receives health and a burst of movement speed if a spell is blocked.
details.tooltip: Sivir creates a magical barrier for seconds that blocks the next incoming enemy Ability. If an ability is blocked, Sivir restores health and triggers Fleet of Foot.

details.summary: Sivir leads her allies in battle, granting them a surge of Move Speed for a period of time. In addition, Sivir's attacks reduce her spell cooldowns.
details.tooltip: Sivir rallies her nearby allies, granting them % Move Speed for seconds. Sivir's attacks against champions while On The Hunt reduce the cooldown of her basic abilities by seconds. Takedowns on recently damaged enemies refreshes the duration of the hunt.

details.summary: Skarner's Attacks, Shattered Earth, Upheaval, and Impale, apply Quaking. At max stacks of Quaking, enemies take max Health magic damage over its duration.
details.tooltip: Skarner's Attacks, Shattered Earth, Upheaval, and Impale, apply Quaking. At max stacks of Quaking, enemies take max Health magic damage over its duration.

details.summary: Skarner rips a boulder from the earth that empowers his attacks and can be thrown as a powerful projectile.
details.tooltip: Skarner rips a boulder from the ground, empowering his next 3 Attacks with % Attack Speed and dealing physical damage to surrounding enemies. His final Attack will deal an additional % max Health physical damage and Slow affected foes by % for s. Recast: Skarner ends this Ability and throws his boulder, dealing + % max Health physical damage, and additionally Slowing the first enemy hit â and any other surrounding enemies â by % for s.

details.summary: Skarner gains a shield and creates an earthquake whose shockwave damages and slows foes.
details.tooltip: Skarner gains Shield for s and triggers an earthquake that deals magic damage and Slows nearby enemies by % for s.

details.summary: Skarner charges forward and passes through terrain. If he collides with a champion or large monster, he'll slam them into the next wall he hits to damage and stun them.
details.tooltip: Skarner charges forward, steering toward the chosen direction and ignoring terrain. If he runs into a champion or large monster, Skarner drags them along for the rest of his charge. Colliding into a wall with an enemy in tow deals physical damage to the enemy and Stuns them for s. Skarner can Recast this Ability to end his charge early.

details.summary: Skarner's tails lash forward to suppress enemy champions. Once suppressed, the victims will be dragged along by Skarner as he moves around.
details.tooltip: Skarner's tails lash forward, dealing magic damage and Suppressing the first 3 champions he hits for s. Those hit are dragged along by Skarner for the duration of this Ability. If Skarner hits at least one champion he gains % Move Speed for seconds. If Shattered Earth is active, Skarner will cast Upheaval first.

details.summary: Hitting champions with Abilities and killing enemies with Super Scorcher Breath grants a stack of Dragon Practice. Stacks increase the damage of Smolders basic Abilities.
details.tooltip: Hitting champions with Abilities and killing enemies with Super Scorcher Breath grants a stack of Dragon Practice. Stacks increase the damage of Smolders basic Abilities.

details.summary: Smolder breathes fire on an enemy. As he gains more stacks, this ability becomes more powerful.
details.tooltip: Smolder belches flame, dealing physical damage + magic damage. If the target dies, Smolder refunds Mana, once per cast. Based on stacks of Dragon Practice, this Ability evolves to gain the following effects: Stacks: Damages all enemies surrounding the target. Stacks: Sends explosions beyond the target that deal % of this Ability's damage. Stacks: Burns the target, dealing max Health true damage over seconds. Enemy champions that drop below total health while burning are killed instantly.

details.summary: Smolder lets out an adorable flaming sneeze that explodes when hitting enemy champions.
details.tooltip: Smolder lets out an adorable flaming sneeze, dealing physical damage and Slowing by % for seconds. Hitting champions causes an explosion, dealing physical + magic damage.

details.summary: Smolder takes flight ignoring terrain and bombarding the lowest health enemy.
details.tooltip: Smolder takes flight, gaining % Move Speed and ignoring terrain for seconds. While flying, Smolder bombards the lowest Health enemy (rounded down) times for physical damage + magic damage per hit.

details.summary: Smolder calls his mom to breath fire from above, dealing extra damage and slowing enemies in the center of her fire.
details.tooltip: Smolder's mom breathes fire from above, dealing physical damage. Enemies in the center take physical damage instead and are Slowed by % for seconds. Smolder's mom heals her son for Health if she hits him.

details.summary: Accelerando: Sona gains non-Ultimate ability haste permanently for her basic abilities as she uses her abilities well, up to a cap. Beyond that cap, further successful uses reduce her ultimate's remaining cooldown instead. Power Chord: Every few spell casts, Sona's next attack will deal bonus magic damage in addition to an additional effect based on what basic Ability Sona last activated.
details.tooltip: Accelerando: Sona gains non-Ultimate ability haste permanently for her basic abilities as she uses her abilities well, up to a cap. Beyond that cap, further successful uses reduce her ultimate's remaining cooldown instead. Power Chord: Every few spell casts, Sona's next attack will deal bonus magic damage in addition to an additional effect based on what basic Ability Sona last activated.

details.summary: Sona plays the Hymn of Valor, sends out bolts of sound, dealing magic damage to two nearby enemies, prioritizing champions and monsters. Sona gains a temporary aura that grants allies tagged by the zone bonus damage on their next attack against enemies.
details.tooltip: Sona deals magic damage to the nearest two enemies, prioritizing champions. She then begins a new Melody. Gain a stack of Accelerando for every champion you damage with this. Melody: Sona gains an aura for seconds, granting allied champions an additional magic damage %i:OnHit% on their next Attack within seconds. Power Chord - Staccato: Power Chord bonus damage ( total magic damage).

details.summary: Sona plays the Aria of Perseverance, sending out protective melodies, healing Sona and a nearby wounded ally. Sona gains a temporary aura that grants allies tagged by the zone a temporary shield.
details.tooltip: Active: Sona restores Health to herself and a nearby allied champion, prioritizing the most wounded. She then begins a new Melody. Melody: Sona gains an aura for seconds, granting allied champions Shield for seconds. Gain a stack of Accelerando whenever you heal another injured ally and every time you protect another ally from at least damage with this shield. Power Chord - Diminuendo: Power Chord also reduces physical and magic damage dealt by the target by for seconds.

details.summary: Sona plays the Song of Celerity, granting nearby allies bonus Move Speed. Sona gains a temporary aura that grants allied champions tagged by the zone bonus Move Speed.
details.tooltip: Active: She begins a new Melody and grants herself Move Speed for seconds, extended to up to seconds if she doesn't take damage. Melody: Sona gains an aura for seconds that grants allied champions Move Speed for seconds. Power Chord - Tempo: Power Chord also Slows the target by for seconds.

details.summary: Sona plays her ultimate chord, stunning enemy champions and forcing them to dance and dealing magic damage to them.
details.tooltip: Sona strikes an irresistible chord, Stunning enemy for seconds and dealing magic damage.

details.summary: Soraka runs faster towards nearby low health allies.
details.tooltip: Soraka runs faster towards nearby low health allies.

details.summary: A star falls from the sky at the target location dealing magic damage and slowing enemies. If an enemy champion is hit by Starcall, Soraka recovers Health.
details.tooltip: Soraka calls down a star, dealing magic damage and Slowing by % for seconds. Hitting an enemy champion grants Soraka Rejuvenation, which restores Health over seconds and grants % Move Speed decaying over the same duration.

details.summary: Soraka sacrifices a portion of her own health to heal another friendly champion.
details.tooltip: Soraka restores Health to another allied champion. If Soraka is affected by Rejuvenation, the Health cost will be reduced by %, and the target will gain Rejuvenation for seconds.

details.summary: Creates a zone at a location that silences all enemies inside. When the zone expires, all enemies still inside are rooted.
details.tooltip: Soraka creates a starfield that deals magic damage to champions. The field lingers for seconds, Silencing enemies inside. When the zone disappears, champions inside the zone are Rooted for second(s) and take magic damage.

details.summary: Soraka fills her allies with hope, instantly restoring health to herself and all allied champions.
details.tooltip: Soraka calls upon divine powers, restoring Health to all allied champions, regardless of distance. Healing is increased to on targets below 40% Health.

details.summary: Swain's ravens collect Soul Fragments that heal him and permanently increase his maximum health.
details.tooltip: Swain's ravens collect Soul Fragments that heal him and permanently increase his maximum health.

details.summary: Swain unleashes several bolts of eldritch power that pierce through enemies. Enemies hit take more damage for each bolt they are struck by.
details.tooltip: Swain unleashes 5 eldritch bolts, dealing magic damage plus magic damage per bolt past the first (max magic damage).

details.summary: Swain opens a demon eye that deals damage and slows enemies. Champions hit are revealed and also grant Swain a Soul Fragment.
details.tooltip: Swain opens a demon eye, revealing a location for 1.5 seconds, then deals magic damage and Slows by % for seconds. Champions hit grant Swain a Soul Fragment and are revealed for seconds.

details.summary: Swain launches a wave of demonic power forward. It then returns to Swain and roots enemies it hits. Swain can then choose to pull all rooted champions closer. This ability has a shorter cooldown during Demonic Ascension.
details.tooltip: Swain launches a wave of demonic power that returns, detonating on the first enemy hit to deal magic damage and Root enemies in the area for seconds. Rooting a champion allows Swain to reactivate this ability to pull all champions Rooted by Nevermove toward him, gaining a Soul Fragment for each.

details.summary: Swain transforms into a demon and drains health from nearby enemy champions, minions, and neutral monsters. Swain can cast Demonflare to decimate and slow nearby enemies with a nova of soulfire. This form is indefinite as long as Swain drains enemy champions.
details.tooltip: Swain frees the demon, which deals magic damage and drains Health per second from nearby enemies. His Demonic Energy depletes over time but can be recharged indefinitely by draining enemy Champions and is fully restored on Champion takedowns. After seconds and every seconds thereafter, Swain can cast Demonflare while transformed, which deals magic damage and Slows enemies by %, decaying over s.

details.summary: After casting a spell, Sylas stores a charge of Petricite Burst. Sylas's basic attacks will expend a charge and whirl his energized chains around him dealing bonus magic damage to enemies hit. While Sylas has a charge of Petricite Burst, he gains attack speed.
details.tooltip: After casting a spell, Sylas stores a charge of Petricite Burst. Sylas's basic attacks will expend a charge and whirl his energized chains around him dealing bonus magic damage to enemies hit. While Sylas has a charge of Petricite Burst, he gains attack speed.

details.summary: Sylas lashes his chains out, intersecting at his targeted location dealing damage to and slowing enemies. After a delay, magical energy explodes from the intersection point dealing damage.
details.tooltip: Sylas lashes his chains out, dealing magic damage and Slowing by for seconds. The place where the chains intersect explodes, dealing a further magic damage.

details.summary: Sylas lunges at an enemy with magical force dealing damage and healing himself against enemy champions.
details.tooltip: Sylas lunges at an enemy with magical force dealing magic damage. Against champions, Sylas restores between and Health based on his missing Health (max healing at or below % Health).

details.summary: Sylas dashes to a location. Sylas can recast the ability to throw his chains out, pulling himself to an enemy he hits.
details.tooltip: Sylas quickly dashes, and prepares a Recast for 3.5 seconds. Recast: Sylas throws his chains, pulling himself to the first enemy hit, dealing magic damage, and Knocking Up for seconds.

details.summary: Sylas steals the enemy's ultimate ability and can cast it freely.
details.tooltip: Sylas hijacks an enemy champion, allowing him to cast a copy of their ultimate Ability, based on his Ultimate level and using his stats. Hijacking an enemy places a Cooldown on them for % (modified by Sylas' Ability Haste) of the enemy's ultimate's Cooldown, with a minimum of seconds, during which time Sylas cannot hijack them again.

details.summary: Syndra collects Splinters of Wrath from gaining levels and damaging enemies which upgrade her abilities. Dark Sphere: Syndra can hold an additional charge Force of Will: Bonus true damage. Scatter the Weak: Increased width and slows all targets Unleashed Power: Executes low health targets
details.tooltip: Syndra collects Splinters of Wrath from gaining levels and damaging enemies which upgrade her abilities. Dark Sphere: Syndra can hold an additional charge Force of Will: Bonus true damage. Scatter the Weak: Increased width and slows all targets Unleashed Power: Executes low health targets

details.summary: Syndra conjures a Dark Sphere dealing magic damage. The sphere remains and can be manipulated by her other powers.
details.tooltip: Syndra conjures a Dark Sphere, dealing magic damage. The Dark Sphere remains for seconds and can be manipulated by Syndra's other Abilities. Splinters of Wrath: Syndra can store charges of Dark Sphere.

details.summary: Syndra picks up and throws a Dark Sphere or enemy minion dealing magic damage and slowing the Move Speed of enemies.
details.tooltip: Syndra grabs a Dark Sphere, enemy minion, or non-epic monster. She drags it with her and can Recast for up to 5 seconds. Recast: Syndra hurls the object, dealing magic damage and Slowing by % for seconds. Splinters of Wrath: This Ability deals an additional true damage.

details.summary: Syndra knocks enemies and Dark Spheres back dealing magic damage. Enemies hit by Dark Spheres become stunned.
details.tooltip: Syndra projects a wave of force, Knocking Back enemies and Dark Spheres and dealing magic damage. Dark Spheres that are pushed Stun enemies for seconds and deal magic damage. Splinters of Wrath: This Ability's width is increased and Slows enemies by % for seconds.

details.summary: Syndra bombards an enemy Champion with all of her Dark Spheres.
details.tooltip: Passive: Dark Sphere gains an additional Ability Haste for each rank of Unleashed Power. Syndra draws on her full cataclysmic power, launching the 3 Dark Spheres orbiting her plus up to 4 more nearby at an enemy champion. Each Dark Sphere deals magic damage (max magic damage). Splinters of Wrath: This Ability executes enemies below % Health.

details.summary: Tahm Kench puts the heft of his immense body behind his attacks, gaining extra damage based on his total health. Damaging enemy champions builds stacks of An Acquired Taste. At three stacks, he can use Devour on an enemy champion.
details.tooltip: Tahm Kench puts the heft of his immense body behind his attacks, gaining extra damage based on his total health. Damaging enemy champions builds stacks of An Acquired Taste. At three stacks, he can use Devour on an enemy champion.

details.summary: Tahm Kench lashes out with his tongue, damaging and slowing the first unit hit and healing himself if he strikes an enemy champion. Applies a stack of An Acquired Taste to enemy champions. If the champion already has 3 stacks of An Acquired Taste, they are stunned and the stacks are consumed.
details.tooltip: Deals magic damage to the first enemy hit and Slows them by % for seconds. On champion hit, heals Tahm for +% of his missing Health and applies a stack of An Acquired Taste dealing extra magic damage. If that champion already had 3 stacks of An Acquired Taste, they will also be Stunned for seconds, consuming the stacks. Activate Devour while your tongue is in midair to devour enemy champions who already have 3 stacks of An Acquired Taste from a distance when you hit them.

details.summary: Dive down and then re-appear at target location, damaging and knocking up all enemies in an area.
details.tooltip: Dive down and then re-appear at target location, dealing magic damage and Knock Up all enemies in an area for second. Hitting at least one enemy champion refunds % of the Cooldown and Mana cost. Devoured allies can be taken along for the ride (but can always hop out early).

details.summary: Passive: Tahm Kench stores a percent of the damage he takes and heals based on it while out of combat. Active: Convert all stored damage into a temporary shield.
details.tooltip: Passive: % of damage Tahm Kench takes is stored by his Thick Skin, increased to % if there are at least nearby enemy champions. If Kench has not taken damage within seconds, Thick Skin will rapidly be consumed to heal Tahm for of its value. Active: Convert all your stored Thick Skin into a Shield, lasting seconds.

details.summary: Tahm Kench devours a champion for a few seconds, dealing magic damage if they are an enemy, or shielding them if they are an ally.
details.tooltip: Tahm Kench devours a champion for a few seconds. He can Recast to spit them out. Enemy Champions: Require 3 stacks of An Acquired Taste. Are devoured for up to seconds and take (+ of their Max Health) magic damage. Tahm Kench is Slowed by % and Grounded during this effect. Ally Champions: Are devoured for up to seconds and are granted Shield which decays gradually after being spit out. Allies can also choose to exit early. Tahm Kench is Grounded during this effect, but can cast Abyssal Dive and gains % Move Speed for seconds.

details.summary: Taliyah gains Move Speed near walls.
details.tooltip: Taliyah gains Move Speed near walls.

details.summary: Taliyah throws a volley of rocks in a target direction, moving freely as she casts. This creates Worked Ground below her. If Taliyah casts Threaded Volley on Worked Ground, she consumes the ground to throw a stronger boulder that slows enemies.
details.tooltip: Taliyah hurls 5 rocks, each dealing magic damage in an area around the first enemy hit while creating Worked Ground at that area. Subsequent hits against the same enemy deal % less damage. Casts on worked ground cost Mana and have % less Cooldown, consume the Worked Ground, and hurl a boulder that Slows enemies it hits by % for seconds, dealing magic damage to the primary target. Monsters hit by the boulder are Stunned for seconds.

details.summary: Taliyah causes an area of ground to erupt and throws enemies within it in a direction of her choosing.
details.tooltip: Taliyah quakes the earth, Knocking enemies in an area in the chosen direction.

details.summary: Taliyah creates a slowing minefield. If enemies dash through it or are knocked through it, the mines explode and stun them.
details.tooltip: Taliyah scatters loose stones in an area, Slowing enemies hit by % and dealing magic damage. The stones detonate when enemies dash or are Knocked through them, Stunning for the remaining movement duration + seconds and dealing magic damage.

details.summary: Taliyah creates a very long wall and then surfs it.
details.tooltip: Taliyah creates a massive earthen wall for seconds. If she immediately Recasts, she will ride along the wall as it unravels. Moving or being immobilized will end the ride. This ability cannot be cast if Taliyah has taken damage from Champions or structures within the last seconds.

details.summary: Talon's spells Wound champions and large monsters, stacking up to 3 times. When Talon attacks a champion with 3 stacks of Wound, they bleed for heavy damage over time.
details.tooltip: Talon's spells Wound champions and large monsters, stacking up to 3 times. When Talon attacks a champion with 3 stacks of Wound, they bleed for heavy damage over time.

details.summary: Talon stabs the target unit. If they are within melee range, this attack deals critical damage. If they are outside melee range, Talon will leap at his target before stabbing them. Talon refunds some health and cooldown if this ability kills the target.
details.tooltip: Talon leaps to a target and deals physical damage. If used in melee range, this Ability instead critically strikes for physical damage. If this Ability kills the target, Talon restores Health and refunds % of its Cooldown.

details.summary: Talon sends out a volley of daggers that then return back to him, dealing physical damage every time it passes through an enemy. The returning blades deal bonus damage and slow units hit.
details.tooltip: Talon tosses a volley of blades, dealing physical damage. The blades then return to him, dealing physical damage and Slowing by % for second.

details.summary: Talon vaults over any terrain or structure, up to a max distance. This ability has a low cooldown, but puts the used terrain on a long cooldown.
details.tooltip: Talon vaults over the nearest terrain or structure. Talon cannot dash over the same terrain more than once every seconds.

details.summary: Talon disperses a ring of blades and becomes Invisible while gaining additional Move Speed. When Talon emerges from Invisibility, the blades converge on his location. Each time the blades move, Shadow Assault deals physical damage to enemies hit by at least one blade.
details.tooltip: Talon disperses a ring of blades that deal physical damage, gains % Move Speed, and becomes Invisible for seconds. When the Invisibility ends, the blades return to Talon, dealing physical damage again. If Talon cancels the Invisibility with an Attack or with Noxian Diplomacy, the blades return to the target instead.

details.summary: Spellcasts empower Taric's next 2 basic attacks to deal bonus magic damage, reduce his spell cooldowns, and attack in quick succession.
details.tooltip: Spellcasts empower Taric's next 2 basic attacks to deal bonus magic damage, reduce his spell cooldowns, and attack in quick succession.

details.summary: Heals nearby allied champions based on charges stored. Bravado-empowered attacks grant a charge of Starlight's Touch.
details.tooltip: Passive: Gain a stack (max ) every seconds and when hitting a Bravado Attack. Active: Consume all stacks to restore Health per stack to nearby ally champions ( at stacks).

details.summary: Passively increase the Armor of Taric and any allied champion with Bastion. Actively shields an ally and grants them Bastion for as long as they remain near Taric. Taric's spells also cast off the ally with Bastion.
details.tooltip: Passive: Taric gains Armor and forms a tether between him and the ally bound by this Ability. As long as they are near each other, the ally gains Armor and Taric casts all his Abilities from both himself and his linked ally. Active: Taric binds to an ally champion, granting a % max Health Shield for seconds.

details.summary: Taric readies a beam of starlight that, after a brief delay, deals magic damage and stuns enemies.
details.tooltip: Taric projects a beam of starlight, bursting after second to deal magic damage and Stun enemies for seconds.

details.summary: Pulses cosmic energy onto nearby allied champions after a delay, making them invulnerable for a short duration.
details.tooltip: Taric calls down protection from the heavens. After seconds, nearby ally champions become invulnerable for seconds.

details.summary: If Teemo stands still and takes no actions for a short duration, he becomes Invisible indefinitely. If he's in brush, Teemo can enter and maintain his Invisibility while moving. After leaving Invisibility, Teemo gains the Element of Surprise, increasing his Attack Speed for a few seconds.
details.tooltip: If Teemo stands still and takes no actions for a short duration, he becomes Invisible indefinitely. If he's in brush, Teemo can enter and maintain his Invisibility while moving. After leaving Invisibility, Teemo gains the Element of Surprise, increasing his Attack Speed for a few seconds.

details.summary: Obscures an enemy's vision with a powerful venom, dealing damage to the target unit and blinding it for the duration.
details.tooltip: Teemo fires a dart, Blinding the target for seconds and dealing magic damage.

details.summary: Teemo scampers around, passively increasing his Move Speed until he is struck by an enemy champion or turret. Teemo can sprint to gain bonus Move Speed that isn't stopped by being struck for a short time.
details.tooltip: Passive: Teemo gains % Move Speed while he hasn't been damaged by a champion or turret in the last seconds. Active: Teemo sprints, gaining % Move Speed that is not lost when struck for seconds.

details.summary: Each of Teemo's attacks will poison the target %i:OnHit% On-Hit, dealing damage on impact and each second after for 4 seconds.
details.tooltip: Passive: Teemo's Attacks apply poison %i:OnHit% On-Hit, dealing an additional magic damage plus magic damage over seconds.

details.summary: Teemo throws an explosive poisonous trap using one of the mushrooms stored in his pack. If an enemy steps on the trap, it will release a poisonous cloud, slowing enemies and damaging them over time. If Teemo throws a mushroom onto another mushroom it will bounce, gaining additional range.
details.tooltip: Teemo tosses a mushroom trap that detonates when stepped on. The traps Slow by % and deal magic damage over seconds. Enemies are revealed for the same duration. Traps last minutes and are stealthed. A mushroom tossed onto another mushroom bounces before landing at its position. This Ability has charges ( second refresh).

details.summary: Thresh can harvest the souls of enemies that die near him, permanently granting him Armor and Ability Power.
details.tooltip: Thresh can harvest the souls of enemies that die near him, permanently granting him Armor and Ability Power.

details.summary: Thresh binds an enemy in chains and pulls them toward him. Activating this ability a second time pulls Thresh to the enemy.
details.tooltip: Thresh throws out his scythe, Stunning the first unit hit and Pulling them towards Thresh for seconds. The scythe does magic damage and also grants True Sight for the duration. Thresh can Recast this Ability to pull himself to the enemy. If this Ability hits, its Cooldown is reduced by seconds.

details.summary: Thresh throws out a lantern that shields nearby allied Champions from damage. Allies can click the lantern to dash to Thresh.
details.tooltip: Thresh throws his lantern, allowing an ally to click on it to dash to Thresh. The lantern also grants Shield for seconds to Thresh and the first ally champion to come in contact with it.

details.summary: Thresh's attacks wind up, dealing more damage the longer he waits between attacks. When activated, Thresh sweeps his chain, knocking all enemies hit in the direction of the blow.
details.tooltip: Passive: Thresh's Attacks deal additional damage based on how long since he last Attacked. They deal between and magic damage. Active: Thresh whips his chains, Pulling or Pushing enemies in the direction of the swing. Enemies hit are also Slowed by % for second and take magic damage.

details.summary: A prison of walls that slow and deal damage if broken.
details.tooltip: Thresh creates a prison of spectral walls, Slowing champions by % for seconds and dealing magic damage. Walls break after one collision, and after one is broken, the rest deal no damage and Slow for half duration.

details.summary: Increases Tristana's Attack Range as she levels.
details.tooltip: Increases Tristana's Attack Range as she levels.

details.summary: Tristana fires her weapon rapidly, increasing her Attack Speed for a short time.
details.tooltip: Tristana goes full-auto, gaining % Attack Speed for seconds.

details.summary: Tristana fires at the ground to propel her to a distant location, dealing damage and slowing surrounding units for a brief period where she lands.
details.tooltip: Tristana launches herself, dealing magic damage and Slowing by % for seconds upon landing. Champion takedowns and max stack Explosive Charge detonations on champions refresh this Ability's Cooldown.

details.summary: When Tristana kills a unit, her cannonballs burst into shrapnel, dealing damage to surrounding enemies. Can be activated to place a bomb on a target enemy that explodes after a short duration dealing damage to surrounding units.
details.tooltip: Passive: Tristana's Attacks that kill enemies deal magic damage to surrounding enemies. Active: Tristana attaches a bomb to an enemy or turret that deals physical damage to surrounding enemies after seconds. The damage is increased by % each time Tristana hits an Attack or Ability (max 4 stacks). At stacks, the bomb explodes immediately (max physical damage).

details.summary: Tristana loads a massive cannonball into her weapon and fires it at an enemy unit. This deals Magic Damage and knocks the target back. If the target is carrying the Explosive Charge bomb, the bomb detonation radius is doubled.
details.tooltip: Tristana fires a massive cannonball, dealing magic damage to the target, Knocking Back and Stunning them and surrounding enemies for seconds.

details.summary: When an enemy unit dies near Trundle, he heals for a percent of its maximum Health.
details.tooltip: When an enemy unit dies near Trundle, he heals for a percent of its maximum Health.

details.summary: Trundle bites his opponent, dealing damage, briefly slowing and sapping some of their Attack Damage.
details.tooltip: Trundle's next Attack deals physical damage and briefly Slows by %, then Trundle gains Attack Damage for seconds and the enemy loses Attack Damage for the same duration.

details.summary: Trundle turns target location into his domain, gaining Attack Speed, Move Speed, and increased healing from all sources while on it.
details.tooltip: Trundle freezes an area for seconds. While inside he gains % Move Speed, % Attack Speed, and % increased healing.

details.summary: Trundle creates an ice pillar at target location, becoming impassable terrain and slowing all nearby enemy units.
details.tooltip: Trundle creates an icy pillar for seconds, briefly Knocking Back enemies directly over it and Slowing nearby enemies by %.

details.summary: Trundle immediately steals a percent of his target's Health, Armor and Magic Resistance. Over the next 4 seconds the amount of Health, Armor, and Magic Resistance stolen is doubled.
details.tooltip: Trundle drains the lifeforce of an enemy champion, dealing max Health magic damage and stealing % Armor and Magic Resist over seconds.

details.summary: Tryndamere gains Fury for each attack, critical strike, and killing blow he makes. Fury passively increases his Critical Strike Chance and can be consumed with his Bloodlust spell.
details.tooltip: Tryndamere gains Fury for each attack, critical strike, and killing blow he makes. Fury passively increases his Critical Strike Chance and can be consumed with his Bloodlust spell.

details.summary: Tryndamere thrives on the thrills of combat, increasing his Attack Damage as he is more and more wounded. He can cast Bloodlust to consume his Fury and heal himself.
details.tooltip: Passive: Tryndamere thirsts for blood, gaining up to Attack Damage based on his missing Health. Active: Tryndamere consumes his Fury, restoring plus Health per Fury (max: ).

details.summary: Tryndamere lets out an insulting cry, decreasing surrounding champions' Attack Damage. Enemies with their backs turned to Tryndamere also have their Move Speed reduced.
details.tooltip: Tryndamere hurls insults, reducing champions' Attack Damage by for seconds and Slowing by % while cowering from him for seconds.

details.summary: Tryndamere slices toward a target unit, dealing damage to enemies in his path.
details.tooltip: Tryndamere spins through his enemies, dealing physical damage and generating Fury per enemy hit, increased to Fury against enemy champions. This Ability's Cooldown is reduced by seconds when Tryndamere critically strikes, and reduced by seconds when critically striking a champion.

details.summary: Tryndamere's lust for battle becomes so strong that he is unable to die, no matter how wounded he becomes.
details.tooltip: Tryndamere becomes completely immune to death for seconds, refusing to be reduced below Health, and instantly gains Fury.

details.summary: Upon killing a unit, Twisted Fate rolls his 'lucky' dice receiving 1 to 6 bonus gold.
details.tooltip: Upon killing a unit, Twisted Fate rolls his 'lucky' dice receiving 1 to 6 bonus gold.

details.summary: Twisted Fate throws three cards, dealing damage to each enemy unit they pass through.
details.tooltip: Twisted Fate throws three cards that deal magic damage each.

details.summary: Twisted Fate chooses a magic card from his deck, and uses that for his next attack, causing bonus effects.
details.tooltip: Twisted Fate begins shuffling his deck, allowing him to Recast to lock in one of three cards and enhance his next Attack. The Blue Card deals magic damage and restores Mana.The Red Card deals to nearby enemies and Slows by % for 2.5 seconds.The Gold Card deals and Stuns for seconds.

details.summary: Every 4 attacks, Twisted Fate deals bonus damage. In addition, his Attack Speed is increased.
details.tooltip: Passive: Twisted Fate gains % Attack Speed and every 4th Attack deals an additional magic damage.

details.summary: Twisted Fate predicts the fortunes of his foes, revealing all enemy champions and enabling the use of Gate, which teleports Twisted Fate to any target location in 1.5 seconds.
details.tooltip: Twisted Fate focuses on his cards, granting True Sight of all enemy champions on the map for seconds and allowing him to Recast. Recast: Twisted Fate teleports up to units away.

details.summary: Twitch's basic attacks infect the target %i:OnHit% On-Hit, dealing true damage each second.
details.tooltip: Twitch's basic attacks infect the target %i:OnHit% On-Hit, dealing true damage each second.

details.summary: Twitch becomes Camouflaged for a short duration and gains Move Speed. When leaving Camouflage, Twitch gains Attack Speed for a short duration. When an enemy champion with Deadly Venom dies, Ambush's cooldown is reset.
details.tooltip: Twitch Camouflages and gains % Move Speed for seconds. The Move Speed increases to % while near an enemy champion that can't see him. After exiting Camouflage, Twitch gains % Attack Speed for seconds. When an enemy champion dies while afflicted with Venom, this Ability's Cooldown is refreshed.

details.summary: Twitch hurls a cask of venom that explodes in an area, slowing targets and applying deadly venom to the target.
details.tooltip: Twitch hurls a cask that adds a stack of Deadly Venom to all enemies struck and leaves behind a toxic cloud that persists for seconds. Enemies that remain within the cloud are Slowed by % and receive an additional stack of Deadly Venom each second.

details.summary: Twitch wreaks further havoc on poisoned enemies with a blast of his vile diseases.
details.tooltip: Deals physical damage to all nearby enemies affected by Deadly Venom, plus an additional physical damage and magical damage per stack of Deadly Venom. Max Damage: physical damage and magical damage.

details.summary: Twitch unleashes the full power of his crossbow, shooting bolts over a great distance that pierce all enemies caught in their path.
details.tooltip: Twitch unleashes his crossbow, gaining Attack Range and Attack Damage, and causing his Attacks to become piercing bolts for seconds. These bolts hit all enemies they pass through, but deal % less damage to subsequent targets, down to a minimum of % damage.

details.summary: Udyr has four basic Abilities that swap between Stances and can Recast an Ability to renew it with Ultimate benefits. Additionally, after using an Ability, Udyr's next two Attacks gain Attack Speed.
details.tooltip: Udyr has four basic Abilities that swap between Stances and can Recast an Ability to renew it with Ultimate benefits. Additionally, after using an Ability, Udyr's next two Attacks gain Attack Speed.

details.summary: Udyr gains attack speed and his next two attacks deal bonus physical damage. Recast: Gain even more attack speed, and the next two attacks call lightning to strike the target.
details.tooltip: Claw Stance: Udyr gains % Attack Speed and his Attacks deal physical damage %i:OnHit% On-Hit for seconds. Additionally, Udyr's next two Attacks in this stance deal a bonus max Health physical damage and gain range. Awaken: Increase bonus Attack Speed to and max Health damage to . Additionally, Udyr's next two Attacks call lightning six times, dealing a total of max Health magic damage to isolated targets (strikes bounce to other nearby targets when possible).

details.summary: Udyr gains a shield and his next two attacks heal him. Recast: Gain an even bigger shield and heal based on max health over the next couple seconds.
details.tooltip: Mantle Stance: Udyr gains Shield for seconds. Additionally, Udyr's next two Attacks gain % Life Steal and restore Health. Awaken: Gain Shield, restore Health over seconds, and Udyr's next two Attacks instead have % Life Steal and restore Health.

details.summary: Udyr gains movement speed and his first attack against each target will Stun them. Recast: Gain even more movement speed and immunity to immobilizing effects for a couple seconds.
details.tooltip: Stampede Stance: Udyr gains Move Speed, decaying over seconds. Additionally, Udyr's Attacks dash him to the target and Stun for seconds ( second Cooldown per target). Awaken: Grants immunity to Immobilizing and Disabling effects and an additional Move Speed for seconds.

details.summary: Udyr surrounds himself in a glacial storm, damaging and slowing nearby enemies. Recast: Empower and unleash the storm, causing it to track enemies and deal additional damage.
details.tooltip: Storm Stance: Udyr surrounds himself in a glacial storm for seconds, dealing magic damage per second to nearby enemies and Slowing them by %. Additionally, Udyr's next two Attacks in this stance deal magic damage to enemies in the storm. Awaken: Unleash the storm, causing it to follow Udyr's last Attacked enemy, deal an additional max Health magic damage over the duration, and Slow by an additional .

details.summary: Urgot's basic attacks and Purge periodically trigger blasts of flame from his legs, dealing physical damage.
details.tooltip: Urgot's basic attacks and Purge periodically trigger blasts of flame from his legs, dealing physical damage.

details.summary: Fires an explosive charge at the target location, dealing physical damage and slowing enemies caught in the explosion.
details.tooltip: Urgot fires an explosive charge, dealing physical damage and Slowing by % for seconds.

details.summary: Urgot slows himself while he unloads his weapon on nearby enemies. Prioritizes enemy champions Urgot has recently struck with other abilities and triggers Echoing Flames.
details.tooltip: Passive: Urgot's other Abilities mark the last champion hit for 5 seconds. Active: Urgot begins firing his chain gun at the closest enemy, prioritizing marked enemies. He Attacks them times a second dealing physical damage per shot. Urgot can move while firing and has % Slow resistance, but loses Move Speed. At max rank, this Ability lasts indefinitely and can be Toggled on and off.

details.summary: Urgot charges in a direction, shielding himself and trampling non-champion enemies. If he catches an enemy champion, he will stop and hurl them out of his way.
details.tooltip: Urgot charges forward, gaining Shield for seconds. The first champion hit is Stunned for seconds and thrown behind Urgot. All enemies Urgot collides with take physical damage.

details.summary: Urgot fires a chem-drill that impales the first enemy champion hit. If that champion falls below a health threshold, Urgot judges them weak and can execute them.
details.tooltip: Urgot fires a chem-drill, impaling the first champion hit, dealing physical damage and Slowing for seconds by 1% per 1% missing Health, up to %. If the impaled victim falls below % Health, Urgot can Recast this Ability, Suppressing the victim and dragging them to himself. On reaching Urgot, they are killed and nearby enemies are Feared for seconds.

details.summary: On kill or assist, Varus temporarily gains Attack Damage and Ability Power. This bonus is larger if the enemy is a champion.
details.tooltip: On kill or assist, Varus temporarily gains Attack Damage and Ability Power. This bonus is larger if the enemy is a champion.

details.summary: Varus readies and then fires a powerful shot that gains extra range and damage the longer he spends preparing to fire.
details.tooltip: Begin Charging: Varus draws back his next shot, Slowing himself by %. After seconds, if not fired, Varus will cancel the Ability and refund % of its Mana cost. Release: Varus releases the arrow, dealing physical damage, reduced by % per enemy hit (minimum %). Damage and Blight detonation effects are increased by up to % based on charge time (maximum ) .

details.summary: Passive: Varus' basic attacks deal bonus magic damage and apply Blight. Varus' other abilities detonate Blight, dealing magic damage based on the target's maximum Health. Active: Varus empowers his next Piercing Arrow.
details.tooltip: Passive: Varus' Attacks deal an additional magic damage and apply a Blight stack for seconds (max stacks). Varus' other Abilities detonate Blight stacks dealing max Health magic damage per stack (max max Health damage). Detonating Blight on champions and epic monsters also reduces his basic Abilities' Cooldowns by % of their Maximum per stack. Active: Varus' next Piercing Arrow deals an additional missing Health magic damage, increased up to missing Health damage based on charge time.

details.summary: Varus fires a hail of arrows that deal physical damage and desecrate the ground. Desecrated ground slows enemies' Move Speed and reduces their self healing and regeneration.
details.tooltip: Varus fires a hail of arrows that deals physical damage and desecrates the ground for seconds, Slowing enemies by % and applying % Grievous Wounds.

details.summary: Varus flings out a damaging tendril of corruption that immobilizes the first enemy champion hit and then spreads towards nearby uninfected champions, immobilizing them too on contact.
details.tooltip: Varus flings out a tendril of corruption, Rooting the first champion hit for seconds and dealing magic damage. Rooted enemies gain Blight stacks over the duration. The corruption spreads from its target to uninfected enemy champions. If it reaches them, they take the same damage and Root.

details.summary: Vayne ruthlessly hunts evil-doers, gaining Move Speed when moving toward nearby enemy champions.
details.tooltip: Vayne ruthlessly hunts evil-doers, gaining Move Speed when moving toward nearby enemy champions.

details.summary: Vayne tumbles, maneuvering to carefully place her next shot. Her next attack deals bonus damage.
details.tooltip: Vayne rolls a short distance, and deals an additional physical damage on her next Attack. This Ability triggers spell effects upon dealing damage.

details.summary: Vayne tips her bolts with a rare metal, toxic to evil things. The third consecutive attack or ability against the same target deals a percentage of the target's max health as bonus true damage.
details.tooltip: Passive: Every third consecutive Attack or Ability against an enemy deals an additional max Health true damage.

details.summary: Vayne draws a heavy crossbow from her back, and fires a huge bolt at her target, knocking them back and dealing damage. If they collide with terrain, they are impaled, dealing bonus damage and stunning them.
details.tooltip: Vayne fires a bolt that Knocks Back and deals physical damage. If the target collides with terrain, they take bonus physical damage and become Stunned for seconds.

details.summary: Readying herself for an epic confrontation, Vayne gains increased Attack Damage, Invisibility during Tumble, reduced Tumble cooldown, and more bonus Move Speed from Night Hunter
details.tooltip: Vayne gains Attack Damage for seconds, extended by seconds whenever a champion damaged by Vayne dies within seconds. Additionally, during the duration:Night Hunter instead grants Move Speed.The Cooldown of Tumble is reduced by %, and grants Invisibility for second.

details.summary: Veigar is the greatest Evil to ever strike at the hearts of Runeterra - and he's only getting bigger! Striking an enemy Champion with a spell or scoring a takedown grants Veigar permanently increased Ability Power.
details.tooltip: Veigar is the greatest Evil to ever strike at the hearts of Runeterra - and he's only getting bigger! Striking an enemy Champion with a spell or scoring a takedown grants Veigar permanently increased Ability Power.

details.summary: Veigar unleashes a bolt of dark energy that deals magic damage to the first two enemies hit. Units killed by this bolt grant Veigar some ability power permanently.
details.tooltip: Veigar unleashes a bolt of dark energy, dealing magic damage to the first two enemies hit. If Veigar kills an enemy with this Ability, he gains stack of Phenomenal Evil. Large minions and large monsters grant stacks instead.

details.summary: Veigar calls a great mass of dark matter to fall from the sky to the target location, dealing magic damage when it lands. Stacks of Phenomenal Evil reduce Dark Matter's cooldown.
details.tooltip: Veigar summons dark matter from the sky, dealing magic damage. Every stacks of Phenomenal Evil reduce this Ability's Cooldown by %.

details.summary: Veigar twists the edges of space, creating a cage that Stuns enemies that pass through.
details.tooltip: Veigar twists the edges of space, creating a cage that Stuns enemies that pass through for seconds. The cage lasts for 3 seconds.

details.summary: Blasts target enemy champion, dealing a large amount of magic damage, increasing based on the target's missing health.
details.tooltip: Veigar blasts an enemy champion with primal magic to deal between and magic damage, increasing with the target's missing Health. Damage is maximized against enemies below 33% Health.

details.summary: Vel'Koz's abilities apply Organic Deconstruction to enemies on hit. If 3 stacks are accumulated, the enemy will take a burst of true damage.
details.tooltip: Vel'Koz's abilities apply Organic Deconstruction to enemies on hit. If 3 stacks are accumulated, the enemy will take a burst of true damage.

details.summary: Vel'Koz shoots a bolt of plasma that splits in two on reactivation or upon hitting an enemy. The bolt slows and damages on hit.
details.tooltip: Vel'Koz shoots a plasma bolt that deals magic damage and Slows by % decaying over second(s). At the end of its range, on hitting a target, or on Recasting, the bolt splits and fires two new bolts at a 90 degree angle. Killing a unit with this restores Mana.

details.summary: Vel'Koz opens a rift to the void that deals an initial burst of damage, then explodes for a second burst of damage after a delay.
details.tooltip: Vel'Koz opens a rift to the void, dealing magic damage. The rift then erupts, dealing magic damage. This Ability has 2 charges ( second refresh).

details.summary: Vel'Koz causes an area to explode, knocking up enemies, and knocking close enemies slightly away.
details.tooltip: Vel'Koz disrupts a nearby area, causing it to explode, Knocking Up for seconds and dealing magic damage. Enemies close to Vel'Koz will be Knocked Back instead of Knocked Up.

details.summary: Vel'Koz unleashes a channelled beam that follows the cursor for 2.5 seconds that deals magic damage. Organic Deconstruction Researches enemy champions causing them to take true damage instead.
details.tooltip: Vel'Koz channels a ray of energy that follows the cursor, dealing a total of magic damage over 2.5 seconds and Slowing by %. Deals true damage instead to enemies recently damaged by Organic Deconstruction. Enemies gain stacks of Deconstruction periodically while in the beam.

details.summary: Vex periodically becomes empowered, causing her next basic Ability to fear enemies and interrupt dashes. Whenever a nearby enemy dashes, Vex applies a mark that can be consumed for bonus damage that also reduces the cooldown of her empowered state.
details.tooltip: Vex periodically becomes empowered, causing her next basic Ability to fear enemies and interrupt dashes. Whenever a nearby enemy dashes, Vex applies a mark that can be consumed for bonus damage that also reduces the cooldown of her empowered state.

details.summary: Launch a damaging missile that accelerates mid-flight.
details.tooltip: Vex launches a wave of mist that deals magic damage. After a delay, the wave becomes smaller and faster. Consumes Gloom on enemies hit.

details.summary: Gain a shield and damage nearby enemies.
details.tooltip: Vex gains Shield for seconds and emits a shockwave that deals magic damage. Consumes Gloom on enemies hit.

details.summary: Summon a damaging and slowing zone that applies Gloom to enemies.
details.tooltip: Vex commands Shadow to fly to a location, increasing in size as it travels. Upon arriving, it deals magic damage and Slows by % for seconds. Killing an enemy with this ability reduces Doom'n Gloom's Cooldown by %. Applies Gloom to enemies hit.

details.summary: Fire a missile that marks an enemy champion. Recast to dash to them and deal damage.
details.tooltip: Shadow excitedly surges forward, dealing magic damage and marking the first enemy champion hit for 4 seconds. Recast: Dash to the marked champion, dealing magic damage on arrival. If the marked champion dies within seconds of taking damage from this Ability, its Cooldown is temporarily reset.

details.summary: Vi charges a shield over time. The shield can be activated by hitting an enemy with an ability.
details.tooltip: Vi charges a shield over time. The shield can be activated by hitting an enemy with an ability.

details.summary: Vi charges her gauntlets and unleashes a vault shattering punch, carrying her forward. Enemies she hits are knocked back and receive a stack of Denting Blows.
details.tooltip: Begin Charging: Vi begins charging a powerful punch, Slowing herself by %. Release: Vi dashes forward dealing between and physical damage based on charge time and applying Denting Blows to all enemies hit. Vi stops upon colliding with an enemy champion, and Knocks them Back.

details.summary: Vi's punches break her opponent's Armor, dealing bonus damage and granting her Attack Speed.
details.tooltip: Passive: Every 3rd Attack on the same target deals an additional max Health physical damage, removes % Armor and grants Vi % Attack Speed for seconds. It also reduces the remaining Cooldown of Blast Shield by seconds.

details.summary: Vi's next attack blasts through her target, dealing damage to enemies behind it.
details.tooltip: Vi's next Attack deals physical damage to the target and enemies behind them. This Ability has 2 charges ( second refresh).

details.summary: Vi runs down an enemy, knocking aside anyone in the way. When she reaches her target she knocks it into the air, jumps after it, and slams it back into the ground.
details.tooltip: Vi singles out an enemy champion, revealing them and dashing unstoppably towards them. Upon reaching them, Vi Knocks them Up for seconds and deals physical damage. Any other enemies Vi collides with are dealt damage, knocked aside, and Stunned for seconds.

details.summary: Enemies who fall before Viego become wraiths. By attacking a wraith, Viego temporarily seizes control of the dead enemy's body, healing for a percentage of his target's max health and gaining access to their basic abilities and items. He replaces their Ultimate with a free cast of his own.
details.tooltip: Enemies who fall before Viego become wraiths. By attacking a wraith, Viego temporarily seizes control of the dead enemy's body, healing for a percentage of his target's max health and gaining access to their basic abilities and items. He replaces their Ultimate with a free cast of his own.

details.summary: Viego's spectral blade passively deals bonus percent current Health damage On-Hit and strikes twice vs. enemies he recently hit with an Ability, stealing Health. Viego can activate this Ability to thrust his zweihander forward, impaling enemies in front of him.
details.tooltip: Passive: Viego's Attacks deal an additional current Health physical damage. His first Attack against an enemy he has recently damaged with an Ability hits a second time, dealing physical damage and restoring % of damage dealt as Health. These bonuses are kept during Possession. Active: Viego stabs forward, dealing physical damage.

details.summary: Viego charges up before dashing forward, releasing a ball of concentrated Black Mist that stuns the first enemy hit.
details.tooltip: Begin Charging: Viego begins gathering Mist, Slowing himself by %. Release: Viego dashes forward and hurls the gathered Mist. Deals magic damage and Stuns the first enemy hit for to seconds based on charge time.

details.summary: Viego commands the Black Mist to haunt and surround a piece of terrain. Viego can hide in the Mist as a wraith, gaining camouflage, Move Speed, and Attack Speed.
details.tooltip: Viego sends forth a spectre to haunt the first terrain hit, surrounding it with Mist for seconds. Viego gains Camouflage, Move Speed, and % Attack Speed while inside the Mist.

details.summary: Viego teleports to a nearby location and executes an enemy champion on arrival, piercing their heart and causing a destructive shockwave around them that knocks away their allies.
details.tooltip: Viego discards any souls he is currently Possessing and teleports. On arrival he Attacks the champion with the lowest percent Health, briefly Slowing them by % and dealing + % missing Health physical damage. Other nearby enemies are Knocked Back and take physical damage.

details.summary: Viktor gains Hex Fragments whenever he kills an enemy. With every 100 Hex Fragments he obtains, Viktor permanently augments an active ability. After upgrading all of his basic abilities, he can gather 100 Hex Fragments to augment his ultimate ability.
details.tooltip: Viktor gains Hex Fragments whenever he kills an enemy. With every 100 Hex Fragments he obtains, Viktor permanently augments an active ability. After upgrading all of his basic abilities, he can gather 100 Hex Fragments to augment his ultimate ability.

details.summary: Viktor blasts an enemy unit with magic damage, which grants him a shield and empowers his next basic attack. Augment: Siphon Power's shield is increased by 60% and Viktor gains bonus move speed after casting the Ability.
details.tooltip: Viktor blasts an enemy, dealing magic damage and granting Viktor Shield for seconds. Viktor's next Attack within 4 seconds deals magic damage. Upgraded: Grants Shield and Viktor additionally gains % Move Speed for seconds.

details.summary: Viktor conjures a heavy gravitational field that slows enemies caught within its radius. Enemies who stay in the field for too long become stunned. Augment: Viktor's spells apply a slow to enemies.
details.tooltip: Viktor deploys a gravitational imprisonment device for seconds, Slowing enemies inside it by %. Enemies who remain within its radius for 1.25 seconds are Stunned for seconds. Upgraded Passive: Viktor's Abilities Slow by % for 1 second.

details.summary: Viktor uses his biomechanical arm to fire a Hextech Ray that cuts across the field in a line, dealing damage to all enemies in its path. Augment: An explosion follows in the Hextech Ray's wake, dealing magic damage.
details.tooltip: Viktor fires a hextech ray in a chosen direction, dealing magic damage to any enemies it hits. Upgraded: An aftershock follows Hextech Ray, dealing magic damage.

details.summary: Viktor conjures an Arcane Storm on the field, dealing magic damage and interrupting enemy channels. The storm periodically does magic damage to all nearby enemies and can be redirected by Viktor. Augment: The Arcane Storm moves 25% faster, and whenever champions die after taking damage from it, the storm grows and increases in its duration.
details.tooltip: Viktor conjures an Arcane Storm in an area for seconds, which instantly deals magic damage followed by magic damage per second to surrounding enemies. The storm automatically follows champions it has recently damaged. Recast: Viktor can manually move the storm. Upgraded: The storm moves % faster. If a champion that the storm has damaged dies, the storm increases its size and its duration by seconds (up to times).

details.summary: Every 30 points of bonus Health gives Vladimir 1 Ability Power and every 1 point of Ability Power gives Vladimir 1.6 bonus Health (does not stack with itself).
details.tooltip: Every 30 points of bonus Health gives Vladimir 1 Ability Power and every 1 point of Ability Power gives Vladimir 1.6 bonus Health (does not stack with itself).

details.summary: Vladimir steals life from the target enemy. When Vladimir's resource is full, Transfusion will benefit from massively increased damage and healing for a brief time.
details.tooltip: Vladimir drains his target's lifeforce, dealing magic damage and restoring Health. After using this Ability twice, Vladimir gains % Move Speed for 0.5 seconds and empowers the next use of this Ability for seconds. The empowered version of this Ability deals magic damage instead and restores an additional plus missing Health.

details.summary: Vladimir sinks into a pool of blood, becoming untargetable for 2 seconds. Additionally, enemies on the pool are slowed and Vladimir siphons life from them.
details.tooltip: Vladimir sinks into a pool of blood for 2 seconds, gaining % decaying Move Speed for second and becoming Untargetable and Ghosted while Slowing enemies in the pool by %. Vladimir deals magic damage and restores Health per enemy over the duration.

details.summary: Vladimir pays his own health to charge up a reservoir of blood which, when released, deals damage in the area around him but can be blocked by enemy units.
details.tooltip: Begin Charging: Vladimir charges up a reservoir of blood, spending up to Health. While at full charge, Vladimir is Slowed by 20%. Release: Vladimir unleashes a torrent of blood missiles at surrounding enemies, dealing between and magic damage based on charge time. If this Ability was charged for at least 1 second, it also Slows targets by % for 0.5 seconds.

details.summary: Vladimir infects an area with a virulent plague. Affected enemies take increased damage for the duration. After a few seconds, Hemoplague deals magic damage to infected enemies and heals Vladimir for each enemy Champion hit.
details.tooltip: Vladimir creates a virulent plague, causing its victims to take % increased damage from all sources for seconds. After it expires, Vladimir deals magic damage to all infected targets. Vladimir restores Health if he hits a champion, and restores an additional Health for each champion beyond the first.

details.summary: Volibear's Attacks and abilities grant Attack Speed, and eventually cause his Attacks to deal bonus magic damage to nearby enemies.
details.tooltip: Volibear's Attacks and abilities grant Attack Speed, and eventually cause his Attacks to deal bonus magic damage to nearby enemies.

details.summary: Volibear gains speed towards enemies, Stunning and damaging the first one he Attacks.
details.tooltip: Volibear gains Move Speed, doubled to towards enemy champions for the next seconds. While active, Volibear's next Attack deals physical damage and Stuns the target for second. Volibear becomes enraged if an enemy Immobilizes him before he Stuns a target, ending the Ability early but refreshing its Cooldown.

details.summary: Volibear damages an enemy, applying on-hit effects and marking them. Casting this ability again on the same target deals bonus damage and Heals Volibear.
details.tooltip: Volibear mauls an enemy, dealing physical damage and marking them for seconds. If this Ability is used on a marked target, its damage is increased to and Volibear restores plus missing Health.

details.summary: Volibear summons a lightning bolt at a location, dealing damage and Slowing enemies while granting Volibear a Shield if he's inside the blast radius.
details.tooltip: Volibear summons a thundercloud that fires a lightning bolt, dealing plus % max Health magic damage and Slowing by % for seconds. If Volibear is inside the blast zone, he gains a plus % max Health Shield for seconds.

details.summary: Volibear leaps to a target location, Slowing and damaging enemies beneath him while gaining bonus Health. Enemy towers near his landing location become temporarily disabled.
details.tooltip: Volibear transforms and leaps, gaining Health and Attack Range for the next seconds. Upon landing, Volibear cracks the earth, Disabling nearby towers for seconds and dealing physical damage to them. Nearby enemies are Slowed by %, decaying over 1 second.
